name: Reece Limited
analysis: REH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$15.7000, stop A$13.5432, target A$22.1704 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
